product.name: Huawei MateBook D16 16" / 16 GB / SSD 512 GB / Win 11 Home / MitchellF-W5651
product.description: The HUAWEI MateBook D16 laptop is equipped with a six-core Intel Core i5-12450H processor with a maximum clock speed of 4.4 GHz. 16 GB of LPDDR4X RAM ensures the device's performance. This is sufficient for simple games, work, and school. A 512 GB solid-state drive ensures fast loading of the operating system, applications, and storage.
